$comment: Recipe consumed by ~/.claude/skills/bump/SKILL.md. Bumps every version-bearing file in one /bump invocation; check-version-drift.sh enforces that no file is missed.
$todos_run_before_post_check: All entries below MUST be done BEFORE running `post_check`. The drift script flags packaging/linux/org.ants.Terminal.metainfo.xml and packaging/debian/changelog because their version-bearing lines live inside the per-release blocks the recipe can't auto-generate — so the bump skill must hand off these todos and only then re-run post_check to confirm clean.
todos: Add `## [{NEW}] — {TODAY}` section to CHANGELOG.md with the actual change body. Include Theme, then categorized bullets (Added/Changed/Fixed/Security as needed). Read 0.6.29/0.6.30 as style references. **Required for post_check to pass.**

Prepend `…` to packaging/linux/org.ants.Terminal.metainfo.xml. The body is HTML

+

  • … mirroring the CHANGELOG entry. **Required for post_check to pass.** Consider invoking the `changelog-writer` subagent to translate the CHANGELOG markdown → metainfo HTML automatically.

Prepend a new `ants-terminal ({NEW}-1) unstable; urgency=medium` block to packaging/debian/changelog with body bullets and `-- Anthony Schemel <aant.schemel@gmail.com>  <RFC2822 date>` footer. **Required for post_check to pass.** Use `dch -v {NEW}-1` if you want the boilerplate (date, header line) formatted automatically.
After todos 1-3 are written, run post_check (`bash packaging/check-version-drift.sh`) and confirm exit 0 before proceeding to build/test/commit.
Run `cd build && cmake --build . --parallel && ctest --output-on-failure` to verify nothing broke.
